name: cdmstores-backend
description: Backend Cloudflare Workers para CDM STORES

scripts.db:local: wrangler d1 execute cdmstores --file=./migrations/001_init.sql --local && wrangler d1 execute cdmstores --file=./migrations/002_seed.sql --local && wrangler d1 execute cdmstores --file=./migrations/003_chatbot_features.sql --local && wrangler d1 execute cdmstores --file=./migrations/004_authentication.sql --local && wrangler d1 execute cdmstores --file=./migrations/005_two_factor_auth.sql --local && wrangler d1 execute cdmstores --file=./migrations/006_security_hardening.sql --local
scripts.db:remote: wrangler d1 execute cdmstores --file=./migrations/001_init.sql --remote && wrangler d1 execute cdmstores --file=./migrations/002_seed.sql --remote && wrangler d1 execute cdmstores --file=./migrations/003_chatbot_features.sql --remote && wrangler d1 execute cdmstores --file=./migrations/004_authentication.sql --remote && wrangler d1 execute cdmstores --file=./migrations/005_two_factor_auth.sql --remote && wrangler d1 execute cdmstores --file=./migrations/006_security_hardening.sql --remote
